title: Lemongrass in Tropical Containers
description: Growing lemongrass in large ceramic pots on a lanai. Great for Hawaiian fusion cooking and keeps mosquitoes away. #lemongrass #lanaigarden #tropicalherbs
alt_text: Tall lemongrass stalks growing in a terracotta pot on a sunny lanai with ocean-facing railing

title: Cherry Tomato Varieties for Warm Climates
description: Best cherry tomato cultivars for year-round growing in warm humid climates. Sun Gold and Sweet 100 thrive in containers. #cherrytomatoes #tropicalgardening #containergarden
alt_text: Cluster of ripe Sun Gold cherry tomatoes on the vine in a raised wooden planter box

title: Thai Basil and Sweet Basil Side by Side
description: Comparing Thai basil vs sweet basil for Hawaiian fusion cooking. Thai basil holds up better in stir-fries and coconut curries. #basil #herbgarden #hawaiianfusion
alt_text: Two basil plants side by side showing the purple stems of Thai basil versus bright green sweet basil

title: Small Lanai Raised Bed Layout Ideas
description: Compact raised bed configurations for a small tropical lanai. Two 4x2 beds with trellis netting for climbing beans and cucumbers. #raisedbed #lanaigarden #smallspacegardening
alt_text: Two cedar raised planter boxes on a wooden deck with trellis netting and sprouting greens

title: Staghorn Coral Macro Close-Up
description: Macro photography of Acropora cervicornis staging recovery on a restored patch. Natural backlighting through shallow water. #coralreef #underwaterphotography #staghorncoral
alt_text: Close-up underwater photo of branching staghorn coral with blue water background and small reef fish

title: Rule of Thirds for Reef Photography
description: Applying rule of thirds underwater for dynamic coral reef compositions. Positioning fish at intersecting points with reef horizon line as anchor. #divephotography #composition #underwaterphotography
alt_text: Split diagram showing underwater reef scene overlaid with rule of thirds grid and a fish at the top-right intersection

title: Olympus TG-7 Underwater Mode Settings
description: Best in-camera settings for the TG-7 in shallow reef environments. Underwater White Balance macro mode and RAW vs JPEG tradeoffs for dive photographers. #olympustg7 #divegear #uwphotography
alt_text: Olympus TG-7 camera with underwater housing showing menu screen with custom white balance setting

title: Kāne'ohe Bay Coral Patch Colors
description: Color palette documentation of healthy Porites lobata in Kāne'ohe Bay. Green-gold hues indicate zooxanthellae health. Reference saves for photo editing consistency. #kaneohe #coralhealth #pacificreef
alt_text: Mound coral Porites lobata colony photographed from above in clear green-tinted water showing healthy coloration

title: Shoyu Poke Bowl with Brown Rice
description: Classic shoyu ahi poke over brown rice with limu kohu and kukui nut. Simple clean flavors that let the fish shine. #poke #hawaiianfood #ahipoke
alt_text: Wide bowl of shoyu ahi poke over brown rice topped with green onion sesame seeds and limu seaweed

title: Kalua Pork and Collard Greens Fusion
description: Hawaiian-Southern crossover: smoky kalua pork slow-cooked with collard greens and a splash of coconut aminos. Sam loved it. #kaluapork #southernhawaiian #fusioncooking
alt_text: Cast iron skillet with shredded kalua pork and braised collard greens with a wooden serving spoon

title: Garlic Butter Mahi-Mahi Tacos
description: Friday taco inspiration with fresh mahi-mahi mango slaw and chipotle crema. Fast enough for a weeknight after dive days. #mahimahi #tacos #hawaiianseafood #pescatarian
alt_text: Three fish tacos in corn tortillas with golden mahi-mahi mango slaw and lime wedge on a wooden board

title: One-Pot Chicken and Dumplings Southern Style
description: Classic Southern chicken and dumplings made in one heavy pot. Comfort food for Sunday evenings at home. #chickendumplings #southernfood #comfortfood #sundaycooking
alt_text: A Dutch oven filled with creamy chicken and dumpling stew with fresh parsley scattered on top

title: Grandma Ruth's Sweet Potato Pie
description: Old-school sweet potato pie recipe from the South. Canned sweet potatoes work fine but fresh roasted taste best. A holiday must from Atlanta. #sweetpotatopie #southernbaking #familyrecipe
alt_text: Slice of deep golden sweet potato pie on a white plate with a dollop of whipped cream

title: Fluffy Buttermilk Biscuits from Scratch
description: Perfectly layered buttermilk biscuits every time. Cold butter grated in is the key. Great with Sam's mango jam. #biscuits #southernbaking #sundaybreakfast
alt_text: Golden brown buttermilk biscuits on a baking sheet with a butter knife and a small jar of mango jam

title: Best Reef-Safe Sunscreens for Divers
description: Comparison of mineral-only reef-safe sunscreens that meet Hawaii state law requirements. Raw Elements and Stream2Sea hold up well underwater. #reefsafe #sunscreen #divegear #oceansafe
alt_text: Three reef-safe mineral sunscreen tubes laid on a rocky coral beach beside a pair of dive fins

title: How to Reduce Microplastics in Your Dive Kit
description: Swapping synthetic fleece and neoprene accessories for lower-shedding alternatives. Small gear choices that matter for reef health. #microplastics #reefsafe #sustainablediving
alt_text: Infographic showing plastic-free dive kit alternatives with icons for biodegradable bags and natural-rubber fins

title: Outrigger Canoe Paddling Drills for Speed
description: Six-person OC-6 timing and cadence drills. Catch timing and exit point technique for windward Oahu conditions. #outrigger #oc6 #paddling #kailuacanoeclub
alt_text: Six paddlers in an outrigger canoe on open blue water with mountains in the background

title: Kailua Beach Morning Paddle Route
description: Kailua Bay morning paddle loop past Popoia Island. Best conditions before 8 AM when trade winds pick up. #kailuabeach #morningpaddle #oahu #outrigger
alt_text: Aerial view of Kailua Bay at sunrise with an outrigger canoe and flat turquoise water near Popoia Island

title: Woven Lauhala Accent Wall Ideas
description: Using lauhala weave panels as feature wall accents in a small cottage. Pairs with natural linen and driftwood tones for authentic Hawaiian coastal feel. #lauhala #hawaiiandecor #cottagestyle
alt_text: Woven lauhala panel mounted on a white cottage wall beside a rattan chair and potted tropical plant

title: Natural Light vs Strobe for Shallow Reef Shots
description: Comparison of ambient-only versus single-strobe lighting for reef photography at 5 to 10 meters. Natural light gives warmer blues in Hawaiian shallows. #reefphotography #strobe #divephotography #olympustg7
alt_text: Side-by-side underwater comparison image showing a coral scene lit by ambient light versus a single strobe showing the difference in color rendition

title: Raised Bed Soil Mix for Tropical Climates
description: Soil mix formula for raised beds in hot humid climates. Higher perlite ratio for drainage in Hawaiian rain patterns. Adds vermicompost for tropical growing. #raisedbed #soilmix #tropicalgardening
alt_text: Hands mixing dark compost soil with perlite in a raised garden bed under bright tropical sun

title: Coconut Milk Rice with Mango Salsa
description: Creamy coconut milk rice as a base for fresh mango salsa and grilled fish. Southern-style one-pot simplicity meets Hawaiian ingredients. #coconutrice #mango #hawaiianfood #pescatarian
alt_text: White bowl of coconut rice topped with fresh mango salsa cilantro and a grilled fish fillet

title: Red Filter vs White Balance for Reef Colors
description: Using a clip-on red filter versus custom white balance on the TG-7. At 5 meters custom WB wins. Beyond 10 meters the red filter helps recover lost warm tones. #reefphotography #tg7 #colorbalance #divegear
alt_text: Two underwater reef images side by side showing color difference with a clip-on red filter versus custom white balance

title: DIY Reef-Safe Bug Repellent for Tropical Use
description: Citronella and lemon eucalyptus repellent that passes Hawaii reef law. Safe to apply before snorkel or beach time without harming coral. #reefsafe #bugrepellent #naturalproducts #hawaii
alt_text: Small amber glass spray bottle of homemade bug repellent beside lemon eucalyptus leaves and citronella plant
